templates.name: Warm-Up: Consolidator
templates.description: Warms a 30-minute SPY consolidator and two registered indicators from one minute-history request before scheduled trade checks.
templates.spec: Asset: SPY. Minute resolution with 30-minute consolidated bars. 2024-09-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. TradeBarConsolidator(30 minutes), ExponentialMovingAverage(10), and RelativeStrengthIndex(12). Add the consolidator, register the manual indicators to it in a loop, warm the consolidator and indicators from one default-resolution TradeBar history request with consolidator.update, ema.update, and rsi.update, and evaluate trades from a 30-minute scheduled rebalance. Demonstrates: consolidator warm-up, registered manual indicators, shared history replay, scheduled trading logic.

templates.name: Equity Parabolic SAR Trailing Stop
templates.description: Trades SPY long-only with Parabolic SAR providing dynamic trailing-stop levels and re-entries.

templates.name: Equity Aroon Trend
templates.description: Trades SPY using AroonOscillator(25); enters long on cross above +50 and exits on cross below -50.
templates.spec: Asset: SPY. Minute resolution. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. AroonOscillator(25). Long when oscillator crosses above 50; exit when it crosses below -50. Demonstrates: Aroon indicator, threshold crossing pattern, plotting oscillator on subchart. Edge case: do not flip short â€” long-only.

templates.name: Equity Bollinger Mean Reversion
templates.description: Trades SPY on a 20-period, 2-standard-deviation Bollinger Bands mean-reversion signal â€” buys when price closes below the lower band and liquidates on a return to the middle band â€” with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Equity RSI Overbought/Oversold
templates.description: Trades QQQ on a 14-period RSI: long when RSI < 30 and exit at RSI > 50; short when RSI > 70 and cover at RSI < 50.

templates.name: Equity Stochastic Oscillator
templates.description: Trades IWM with a 14/3/3 Stochastic oscillator, going long on %K crossing %D from below 20 and exiting on a cross from above 80.

templates.name: Crypto Static Universe
templates.description: Trades a fixed list of Cryptocurrencies on Bitfinex at minute resolution with a weekly rebalance.

templates.name: Index Options Universe
templates.description: Filters the SPXW Index Option chain to 0DTE strikes near ATM and buys the call with the lower strike.

templates.name: CFD
templates.description: Trades CFDs across German, Asian, and US index markets with Scheduled Events aligned to each market's hours.

templates.name: Equities Static Universe
templates.description: Simple template with a fixed list of assets, indicators, and a scheduled event.

templates.name: Equity Options Universe
templates.description: Filters SPY weekly Equity Options to ATM calls and puts and executes a long straddle.

templates.name: Crypto Futures
templates.description: Trades Crypto Futures (BTC, ETH, LTC) on Binance margin in USDT with weekly rebalancing and margin-interest tracking.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for EODHD Upcoming Splits
templates.description: Selects US Equities with a forward split in the next 3 days and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Equity ADX Trend Filter
templates.description: Combines a 50/200 EMA crossover signal with an ADX(14) > 25 filter to trade SPY only in trending regimes.

templates.name: Equity ROC Momentum Rank
templates.description: Ranks 10 sector ETFs by 60-day ROC monthly and equal-weights the top 3 with a scheduled rebalance.
templates.spec: Assets: XLK,XLF,XLE,XLV,XLI,XLB,XLY,XLP,XLU,XLRE. Minute. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $200k. ROC(60). Monthly schedule (first trading day) ranks ETFs and equal-weights the top 3. Demonstrates: multi-symbol indicator dictionary, sector rotation, scheduled monthly rebalance. Edge case: liquidate names that drop out of the top 3.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for US Congress Trading
templates.description: Selects US Equities recently bought by US Congress members in trades over $200K and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Equity 60/40 Portfolio
templates.description: Holds a static 60% SPY / 40% TLT allocation with quarterly rebalance back to target weights.
templates.spec: Assets: SPY, TLT. Minute. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. Set holdings 60/40 on first bar; schedule a quarterly rebalance (first business day of Jan/Apr/Jul/Oct) to retarget. Demonstrates: scheduled events with quarter_start rule, portfolio rebalancing logic, simple set_holdings. Edge case: drift threshold of 5% to skip no-op rebalances.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for EODHD Upcoming IPOs
templates.description: Selects expected/priced non-penny IPOs with a confirmed IPO date and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Corporate Lobbying
templates.description: Selects US Equities whose corporate lobbying spend totals at least $100K and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Equity Monthly ROC Rotation
templates.description: Rotates monthly into the 3 ETFs (SPY, EFA, EEM, AGG, GLD) with the highest 60-day ROC, equal-weighted.
templates.spec: Assets: SPY, EFA, EEM, AGG, GLD. Minute. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. ROC(60) per ETF. Monthly schedule picks top 3 and equal-weights; liquidates the others. Demonstrates: ROC across asset classes, monthly schedule, set_holdings 1/3 each. Edge case: hold cash if all ROCs negative.

templates.name: Equity Fisher Transform Reversal
templates.description: Trades NDX-tracking QQQ on FisherTransform extreme readings, fading values above 2.0 and below -2.0.
templates.spec: Asset: QQQ. Minute resolution. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. FisherTransform(10). Short when value > 2 and turning down; long when < -2 and turning up; exit on cross of 0. Demonstrates: FisherTransform indicator, RollingWindow on indicator value to detect turns. Edge case: only one position at a time.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Brain ML Stock Ranking
templates.description: Selects US Equities with positive Brain ML rankings across 2-, 3-, and 5-day horizons and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Crypto Universe
templates.description: Selects the top 10 Cryptos by USD volume on Coinbase and rebalances daily at noon.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for EODHD Upcoming Earnings
templates.description: Selects US Equities reporting earnings in the next 3 days with a positive analyst estimate and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for EODHD Upcoming Dividends
templates.description: Selects US Equities going ex-dividend in the next day with a payout above $0.05 and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for US Government Contracts
templates.description: Selects US Equities with at least 3 government contracts totalling over $50K and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Insider Trading
templates.description: Selects the 10 US Equities with the largest insider-trading dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Equity Chaikin Money Flow
templates.description: Trades XLF using ChaikinMoneyFlow(20) â€” long when CMF > 0.1 and short when CMF < -0.1, flat in between.
templates.spec: Asset: XLF. Minute resolution. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. ChaikinMoneyFlow(20). Long when CMF > 0.10; short when CMF < -0.10; flat in the dead zone. Demonstrates: CMF volume indicator, threshold-based regime, plotting indicator on subchart. Edge case: rebalance only on signal change.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Smart Insider Transactions
templates.description: Selects $100M+ market-cap US Equities executing buybacks over 0.5% of shares and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Smart Insider Intentions
templates.description: Selects $100M+ market-cap US Equities announcing buyback intentions over 0.5% of shares and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Futures
templates.description: Trades the continuous E-mini SP 500 Future and rolls between contract months on SymbolChangedEvents.

templates.name: Forex
templates.description: Trades three Forex pairs using a Minimum indicator on the bid-ask spread to enter when spreads are tightest.

templates.name: Alternative Data
templates.description: Ranks Equities with the Brain ML Ranking dataset and sizes positions from predicted returns via portfolio targets.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Brain Sentiment Indicator
templates.description: Selects US Equities with positive 7-day media sentiment and active mention coverage and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Equity ATR Volatility Stop
templates.description: Holds SPY long with an ATR(14) chandelier-style trailing stop set 3x ATR below the trailing high.
templates.spec: Asset: SPY. Minute resolution. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. ATR(14). Buy on first bar; maintain trailing high; if close < trailing_high - 3*ATR, liquidate and re-enter on next bar. Demonstrates: ATR indicator, manual trailing-stop pattern, plotting stop level. Edge case: reset trailing high after each liquidation.

templates.name: Equity Donchian Turtle Breakout
templates.description: Implements a 20/10 Donchian channel turtle breakout on a basket of liquid US ETFs with ATR-based position sizing.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for CNBC Trading
templates.description: Selects US Equities with 3+ BUY recommendations from CNBC personalities and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Crypto BTC vs PAXG Fed Funds Toggle
templates.description: Rotates between BTCUSD and gold-backed PAXGUSD on Kraken based on the 3-month change in the FRED Fed Funds Rate â€” long BTC when easing, gold when hiking or flat.

templates.name: Equity Turn-of-Month Effect
templates.description: Holds SPY only on the last 4 and first 3 trading days of each month and stays in cash otherwise.
templates.spec: Asset: SPY. Minute. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. Use trading calendar to identify last 4 and first 3 trading days of each month; hold SPY on those days, otherwise liquidate. Demonstrates: trading calendar API, scheduled events with custom date logic. Edge case: handle month boundary spanning weekends/holidays.

templates.name: History and ETF Universe
templates.description: Selects QQQ constituents, ranks them by a daily ATR, and rebalances using ETF weights.

templates.name: Live: Telegram Webhook Notifications
templates.description: Sends notifications to a Telegram bot via notify.web on every trade fill.
templates.spec: Asset: SPY. Minute. 2024-09-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. EMA(50)/EMA(200) cross. On on_order_event(filled) call notify.web('https://api.telegram.org/...', headers={...}, body='...'). Demonstrates: notify.web for arbitrary HTTP webhook (different from email/SMS in live-trading-features). Edge case: stub URL in backtest mode.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for Brain Language Metrics on Company Filings
templates.description: Selects US Equities with positive sentiment in both the report and MD&A sections of their latest SEC filings and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Chained Universe
templates.description: Chains an ETF-constituents universe (QQQ) into a fundamental PE filter to select the most undervalued stocks.

templates.name: Trade Management
templates.description: Implements a One-Cancels-Other (OCO) pattern with a market order entry and paired stop-loss and take-profit orders, where one of the paired orders cancels when the other fills.

templates.name: Equity MACD Histogram Divergence
templates.description: Detects MACD histogram divergence on AAPL and trades crossovers of the signal line, holding until the histogram flips sign.

templates.name: Equity SuperTrend Trend Following
templates.description: Trades SPY with a 10-period 3x ATR SuperTrend, flipping long/short on direction changes of the band.

templates.name: Equity Williams %R
templates.description: Trades IWM with WilliamsPercentR(14): long entries below -80 and exits above -20.
templates.spec: Asset: IWM. Minute resolution. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. WilliamsPercentR(14). Long when %R < -80; exit when %R > -20. Demonstrates: Williams %R indicator, oversold reversion logic, plotting against -80/-20 reference lines. Edge case: hold cap of 5 trading days.

templates.name: Crypto On-Chain Network Activity
templates.description: Holds BTCUSD long when both Bitcoin transaction count and hash rate are above their 30-day SMAs (demand and supply expanding); flat otherwise.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for EODHD Upcoming Dividends
templates.description: Selects US Equities going ex-dividend in the next day with a payout above $0.05 from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Equity Commodity Channel Index
templates.description: Trades XLE on CCI(20) â€” long when CCI < -100 and exit at 0; short when CCI > 100 and cover at 0.
templates.spec: Asset: XLE. Minute resolution. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. CommodityChannelIndex(20). Long when CCI < -100; short when CCI > 100; both exit at 0. Demonstrates: CCI indicator, mean-reversion with explicit short side, sector ETF. Edge case: skip orders during low-volatility (ATR filter).

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for US Congress Trading
templates.description: Selects US Equities recently bought by US Congress members in trades over $200K from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Financial Advisors
templates.description: Demonstrates Interactive Brokers Financial Advisor group/account allocations via order properties along with live brokerage messages.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Brain Sentiment Indicator
templates.description: Selects US Equities with positive 7-day media sentiment and active mention coverage from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Future Options
templates.description: Builds a bull call spread on E-mini SP500 Future Options.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for EODHD Upcoming Splits
templates.description: Selects US Equities with a forward split in the next 3 days from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Equity Opening Range Breakout
templates.description: Trades SPY breakouts of the 30-minute opening range, going long above the high and short below the low until end of day.
templates.spec: Asset: SPY. Minute resolution. 2024-09-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. Build opening range 9:30-10:00; long on first cross above range high; short on first cross below range low. Force liquidate at 15:55. Demonstrates: minute resolution, scheduled events for ORB window, end-of-day flat. Edge case: only one trade per day.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Brain ML Stock Ranking
templates.description: Selects US Equities with positive Brain ML rankings across 2-, 3-, and 5-day horizons from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for EODHD Upcoming Earnings
templates.description: Selects US Equities reporting earnings in the next 3 days with a positive analyst estimate from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Smart Insider Transactions
templates.description: Selects $100M+ market-cap US Equities executing buybacks over 0.5% of shares from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Dataset: Blockchain Bitcoin Metadata
templates.description: Trades BTCUSD long when 30-day Bitcoin block-time metadata trends down (faster blocks => more activity), flat when up.
templates.spec: Asset: BTCUSD on Coinbase + BitcoinMetadata custom data. Minute. 2023-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. add_data(BitcoinMetadata) for block time and difficulty fields. ROC(30) of average block time; long BTCUSD when ROC < 0, flat when > 0. Demonstrates: Blockchain Bitcoin Metadata dataset, on-chain regime switch (distinct from MVRV/hashrate templates). Edge case: handle stale data.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Smart Insider Intentions
templates.description: Selects $100M+ market-cap US Equities announcing buyback intentions over 0.5% of shares from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Intraday Indicator Scans
templates.description: Scans QQQ constituents every 15 minutes with a minute-resolution ATR to select the most volatile constituents intraday.

templates.name: Equity Ichimoku Cloud
templates.description: Trades QQQ using the Ichimoku Kinko Hyo cloud, entering long on Tenkan/Kijun bullish cross above the cloud.

templates.name: Equity Country GDP Growth Rotation
templates.description: Equal-weights the 3 country ETFs with the highest annual GDP growth from a basket of 8 major economies, using the EODHD Macro Indicators dataset.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for CNBC Trading
templates.description: Selects US Equities with 3+ BUY recommendations from CNBC personalities from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe for CoinGecko Crypto Market Cap
templates.description: Selects the top 10 Cryptocurrencies by CoinGecko market cap that are tradable on Coinbase and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Corporate Lobbying
templates.description: Selects US Equities whose corporate lobbying spend totals at least $100K from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Index Options Static
templates.description: Trades SPX Index Options, buying the ATM contract with the closest expiration.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for US Government Contracts
templates.description: Selects US Equities with at least 3 government contracts totalling over $50K from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Insider Trading
templates.description: Selects the 10 US Equities with the largest insider-trading dollar volume from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Custom Data with Ticker Mapping
templates.description: Loads custom data tied to an Equity whose ticker changed (FB to META) using point-in-time SecurityIdentifier mapping from the Object Store.

templates.name: Equity OBV Divergence
templates.description: Detects bullish/bearish On-Balance Volume divergence on SPY versus a 20-day price ROC and trades reversals.
templates.spec: Asset: SPY. Minute resolution. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. OBV indicator and ROC(20) on price. Bullish divergence: price ROC < 0 but OBV ROC > 0 -> long. Bearish opposite -> short. Demonstrates: OBV automatic indicator, IndicatorExtensions to compute ROC of OBV, divergence logic. Edge case: require 5-day confirmation.

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for Brain Language Metrics on Company Filings
templates.description: Selects US Equities with positive sentiment in both the report and MD&A sections of their latest SEC filings from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Equity Options Static
templates.description: Trades a fixed SPY Equity Option chain, constructing and rebalancing a covered call on a weekly schedule.

templates.name: Equity Cross-Sectional Momentum Decile
templates.description: Selects the top decile of S&P 500 stocks by 12-1 month momentum and rebalances monthly into an equal-weight long portfolio.
templates.spec: Universe: S&P 500 (etf-constituents on SPY) capped at 100 by dollar volume. Minute. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $250k. Compute 252-21 day return (12-1 momentum) via history. Monthly schedule selects top decile (~10 names) and equal-weights. Demonstrates: ETF universe, history-based factor, monthly rebalance, set_holdings on top decile.

templates.name: Custom Consolidators
templates.description: Builds a calendar-based QuoteBar consolidator anchored to 5 PM ET, applies an EMA on the consolidated Forex bars, and trades crossovers.

templates.name: Equity All-Weather Portfolio
templates.description: Implements Ray Dalio's All-Weather: 30% SPY, 40% TLT, 15% IEF, 7.5% GLD, 7.5% DBC with annual rebalance.
templates.spec: Assets: SPY, TLT, IEF, GLD, DBC. Minute. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $200k. Set target weights on first bar; annual schedule retargets. Demonstrates: multi-asset allocation, scheduled annual rebalance, holdings drift monitoring. Edge case: skip GLD/DBC if missing in early data.

templates.name: Equities Universe
templates.description: Fundamental universe selecting top undervalued large-caps ranked by an EMA100/EMA300 cross, rebalanced daily.

templates.name: Live: Commands Listener
templates.description: Pauses/resumes an SPY EMA cross strategy via the on_command handler, with pause state persisted in the Object Store.
templates.spec: Asset: SPY. Minute. 2024-09-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. Override on_command(data): when data.command=='pause', set self._paused = data.paused and persist via object_store. EMA(50)/EMA(200) trades only when not paused. Demonstrates: on_command pattern with direct algorithm-attribute mutation. Edge case: restore pause state across restarts from Object Store.

templates.name: Equity Keltner Squeeze Breakout
templates.description: Trades a basket of US ETFs on Bollinger-inside-Keltner squeeze releases â€” long on a close above the upper Bollinger Band, short below the lower, exiting at the midline.

templates.name: Equity Value/Quality Composite
templates.description: Selects S&P 500 names by a composite of low PE, low PB, and high ROE; equal-weights the top 20 monthly.
templates.spec: Universe: fundamental. Daily. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $250k. Rank by z-score of (-PE, -PB, +ROE) and combine equally; pick top 20 names. Monthly rebalance. Demonstrates: fundamental data, multi-factor composite, equal-weight. Edge case: skip names with missing fundamentals (use is_finite checks).

templates.name: Alternative Data Chained Universe for EODHD Upcoming IPOs
templates.description: Selects expected/priced non-penny IPOs with a confirmed IPO date from the top 100 US Equities by dollar volume and equal-weights them with a daily scheduled rebalance.

templates.name: Option SPY Iron Condor
templates.description: Sells weekly SPY iron condors with short strikes ~10 delta and long wings 3 strikes wider.

templates.name: Live Trading Features
templates.description: Demonstrates live email and SMS notifications, brokerage disconnect/reconnect handling, and commands.

templates.name: Custom Indicator
templates.description: Implements a custom Money Flow Index indicator and trades SPY on its signals.

templates.name: Intraday Greeks-Based Options Selection
templates.description: Selects RUT Index Options intraday by target delta from EMA-driven signals with paced order submission.

templates.name: Custom Data
templates.description: Defines a custom data source type that ingests Bitstamp data and plots daily Bitcoin prices.

templates.name: Intraday Index Options Selection
templates.description: Loads the SPX weekly chain daily and re-filters ATM calls every 5 minutes to trade as contracts update intraday.

templates.name: AI
templates.description: Trains a TensorFlow MLP weekly on warmed-up history to predict SPY direction.

templates.name: Equity Pairs Trading (Cointegration)
templates.description: Trades the spread between KO and PEP using a 60-day OLS hedge ratio and z-score thresholds for entries/exits.
templates.spec: Assets: KO, PEP. Minute resolution. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. Compute hedge ratio via 60-day rolling OLS on closes; z-score the spread; long-spread when z<-2 (long KO, short PEP); short-spread when z>2; exit when |z|<0.5. Demonstrates: history requests for OLS, RollingWindow, dollar-neutral sizing. Edge case: re-fit hedge ratio weekly.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe
templates.description: Uses EODHD upcoming-earnings data to select Equities and trades straddles around earnings announcements.

templates.name: Custom Models
templates.description: Replaces the default fee, fill, slippage, and buying-power models through a security initializer.

templates.name: Equity Permanent Portfolio
templates.description: Holds 25% each of SPY, TLT, GLD, and SHY with annual rebalance — Browne's Permanent Portfolio.
templates.spec: Assets: SPY, TLT, GLD, SHY. Minute. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. Equal-weight 25% on first bar; annual rebalance every January 2nd. Demonstrates: 4-asset allocation, annual scheduled event, scheduled-event rule chaining. Edge case: skip rebalance if drift < 3% from target.

templates.name: Equity Dual Momentum
templates.description: Implements Antonacci dual momentum across SPY, EFA, and AGG: pick the top 12-month return, fall back to AGG if absolute momentum is negative.
templates.spec: Assets: SPY, EFA, AGG. Minute resolution. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $100k. Monthly: compute 12-month return for each; pick the highest; if highest <= AGG return then hold AGG; else hold winner 100%. Demonstrates: history-based momentum, monthly schedule, conditional hold. Edge case: rebalance only on first trading day of month.

templates.name: Equity Dollar Cost Averaging
templates.description: Buys $5,000 worth of VOO every Monday morning regardless of price, accumulating shares over the backtest.
templates.spec: Asset: VOO. Minute. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $200k starting cash. Schedule: every Monday after market open buy VOO with $5,000 of cash via market_order using calculate_order_quantity. Demonstrates: weekly schedule, fixed-dollar buys, calculate_order_quantity, no liquidation. Edge case: skip if insufficient cash; never sell.

templates.name: Equity Low-Volatility Factor
templates.description: Selects the bottom decile of S&P 500 names by 60-day realized volatility and equal-weights them monthly.
templates.spec: Universe: SPY constituents. Daily. 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-31, $250k. Use history(60, Resolution.DAILY) per name to compute std of returns. Monthly schedule selects 30 lowest-vol names; equal-weight long. Demonstrates: history requests inside universe selector, factor-based selection, monthly rebalance. Edge case: drop names with insufficient history.
